---
title: "Indústria"
subtitle: "Projetos de consultoria e extensão para o setor industrial"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: .
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: "200px"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
---
